claim: AI agents are being deployed at massive scale - CrewAI runs 450 million agents monthly with 1.1 billion quarterly agentic executions
actionable: Use this as evidence that multi-agent systems are production-ready and understand the scale requirements for agent deployment infrastructure
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: The real value of AI agents is in production running, not in the building phase - building has negative ROI until deployment
actionable: Focus development effort on getting agents into production quickly rather than perfecting them in development, as ROI only materializes at scale
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: There's a gap between building/prototyping (easy) and deploying agents (hard) - many companies struggle with blockers like evals, guard rails, SSO, and infrastructure
actionable: When deploying agents, plan for non-AI infrastructure challenges like authentication, data storage, and compliance requirements alongside agent development
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: Agentic systems combining deterministic flows with optional agency at each step are emerging as a practical pattern - mixing flows with agents improves usability
actionable: Design agent systems with a deterministic backbone (if-then steps) and optionally add agent autonomy at specific decision points based on task complexity
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: Insurance company automated KYC process from 1 week to 15-30 minutes with AI agents - 4x faster with higher accuracy than humans
actionable: Consider AI agents for rule-based verification workflows that require data synthesis from multiple sources, using agents to orchestrate the integration
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: CPG company reduced fraud detection reimbursement process from 3 days to 10 minutes using agents by automating manual verification
actionable: Apply agents to verification/validation workflows that involve checking multiple data sources and pattern matching against known fraud indicators
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: Enterprise adoption of AI agents is centralized under CIO/CDIO control with guardrails, PII filtering, and team enablement - different from early LLM adoption
actionable: When rolling out agents in enterprise, establish central governance and controls rather than allowing distributed development to prevent compliance and data issues
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: Agent repository pattern (shared internal repository of reusable agents and tools) prevents duplication and enables sharing across teams
actionable: Build a central registry of agents and tools in your organization with proper versioning and documentation to enable team collaboration and reduce redundant work
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI

claim: Memory implementations for agents (short-term, long-term, and entity-based) should use RAG or graph-RAG to store learnings across agent runs
actionable: Implement persistent memory for agents using vector databases or graph databases to avoid re-researching the same information across multiple runs
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | João Moura: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi Agent Systems with CrewAI
